name: crystal-magic-conventions
description: Project conventions for Crystal Magic Unity GameComponent, UI, ECS, pooling, input, and runtime factory code.

interface.shortDescription: Project coding rules for Crystal Magic
interface.longDescription: Shared Codex skills for Crystal Magic. Covers GameEntry component registration, ResourceComponent and PoolComponent object flow, InputComponent event routing, UI MVC refresh patterns, and ECS struct/Job/Burst file organization.
